description_long: This is a modern, ankle-high shoe with a sleek, futuristic design, primarily in shades of gray with metallic gold accent tabs on the tongue, side, and heel pull. The upper features a textured, grippy forefoot area that transitions into a smoother, matte finish around the ankle and heel. The shoe has a slip-on construction with no visible laces, and a pull tab at the back for easy wearing. The sole is thick and robust, likely made from durable rubber, and the overall silhouette is streamlined for urban use. Subtle geometric patterns and a faint emblem on the side add to its contemporary aesthetic. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the shoe is in pristine, new condition.
description: A sleek, gray slip-on ankle shoe with gold accent tabs, textured forefoot, and a modern, streamlined silhouette. The design is clean, with a robust sole and subtle geometric details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, textured forefoot, and prominent gold tab on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side gold accent, pull tab at the heel, and the faint emblem on the ankle area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel pull tab, gold accent, and the vertical seam running down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side gold accent and the clean, smooth ankle area.
